name: cowork-ai-os
description: Turn Claude Cowork into your AI operating system. v0.9 progressive-disclosure architecture: slim Global Instructions, identity files loaded on-demand by skills, auto-archiving memory. Onboarding, daily brief with optional team comms (Slack/Discord/Telegram/Teams) + tasks, plan-then-approve file organization (/tidy-downloads with declared safe zones, never deletes, weekly schedule), voice writer, audit, weekly self-improvement loop, and /optimize speed-fix bundled. Built by Nuno Tavares of Automated Marketer.
